tasks.title: platform identity normalization
tasks.expectedOutput: Local docs/config identity normalization plan; remote switch remains blocked while transfer is postponed.
tasks.notes: Local identity normalization is complete. Actual remote switch remains blocked until the AE Platform repository is reachable.

tasks.title: vercel preview setup plan
tasks.expectedOutput: Preview-only plan with no production deployment.
tasks.notes: Local Vercel preview setup plan is complete. Actual Vercel deploy/domain connection remains blocked.

tasks.title: linear workspace roadmap
tasks.expectedOutput: Linear labels, statuses, and backlog import plan.
tasks.notes: Local Linear workspace roadmap plan is complete. Actual Linear integration remains blocked.

tasks.title: github branch protection plan
tasks.expectedOutput: Branch protection template and first issues import plan.
tasks.notes: Local GitHub branch protection plan is complete. Actual GitHub settings/API remain blocked.

tasks.title: copilot agent first issue
tasks.notes: Local Copilot first issue plan is complete. Actual GitHub/Copilot execution remains blocked.

tasks.title: qa build hardening
tasks.notes: Local QA build hardening plan is complete. Build remains controlled and not automatic.

tasks.title: premium library metadata next step
tasks.expectedOutput: Metadata, QA, and provenance task only.
tasks.notes: Local premium library metadata plan is complete. Audio import, sample copying, and commercial readiness claims remain blocked.

tasks.title: demo status page
tasks.expectedOutput: Plan for an honest demo/staging status page.
tasks.notes: Local demo status page plan is complete. No App.jsx, route, deploy, or public page change was made.

tasks.title: cost guard automation
tasks.notes: Planning-only cost guard complete. No external automation, autonomous spending, push, deploy, payment, or writer/export enabled.

tasks.title: github transfer readiness audit
tasks.notes: Planning-only transfer readiness audit complete. Current origin remains Sari-raslan/universal-arranger-os; future AE Platform target remains manual and not completed.

tasks.title: local release notes / owner handoff pack
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only owner handoff pack and release notes draft.
tasks.notes: Planning-only owner handoff complete. Local release notes are marked LOCAL ONLY - NOT PUBLIC RELEASE.

tasks.title: static demo gateway safety handoff
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only static demo gateway safety handoff.
tasks.notes: Planning-only gateway safety handoff complete. Gateway language is LOCAL ONLY - NOT PUBLIC RELEASE.

tasks.title: Jobcenter / supporter presentation safety plan
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only Jobcenter/supporter presentation claims safety plan.
tasks.notes: Planning-only presentation safety plan complete. Materials must remain LOCAL ONLY - NOT PUBLIC RELEASE.

tasks.title: private demo gateway link config safety seal
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only safety seal for intentional private demo gateway config changes.
tasks.notes: Safety seal complete. Config changes are intentional for Jobcenter/supporter screenshots only. No push, hosting publication, Vercel command, or public release.

tasks.title: local demo URL inventory / screenshot map
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only demo URL inventory and screenshot map.
tasks.notes: Planning-only inventory complete. All entries are LOCAL ONLY or STATIC LOCAL DEMO.

tasks.title: presentation asset final checklist
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only final checklist for presentation assets.
tasks.notes: Planning-only asset checklist complete. All relevant assets remain LOCAL ONLY or STATIC LOCAL DEMO.

tasks.title: GitHub transfer wait gate / publication freeze
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only GitHub transfer wait gate and publication freeze.
tasks.notes: Planning-only wait gate complete. Publication/hosting/Vercel freeze remains active until owner verifies target readiness.

tasks.title: final local factory freeze and bounded local agent queue
tasks.expectedOutput: Local-only final factory freeze, bounded local agent queue, first packet, and report.
tasks.notes: Final local freeze complete. Publication, hosting, paid-flow, release, and export gates remain blocked.

tasks.title: bounded local agent A project docs consolidation
tasks.expectedOutput: One small local docs consolidation report using the first bounded agent packet.
tasks.notes: Local docs/report task only. Stop after the written report and checks.
